title: Ability to customize the sort order of the battery widget.
excerpt:
Description
Ability to customize the sort order of the battery widget. 
What are you trying to achieve
Have the battery widget show the colors/values in a logical order. For example: Done 1, Done 2, InProgress, Planning,…

posts.author: SusanImp (Susan Imperato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Ability to customize the sort order of the battery widget.

What are you trying to achieve

Have the battery widget show the colors/values in a logical order. For example: Done 1, Done 2, InProgress, Planning, Intake, Hold, Cancel
